{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323150007FA86B5FF35297CB4A2D3\"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608914733463503640","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容丰富，故事情节曲折，挺吸引人的…"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771590662,"group_id":"7602421477824007192","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzQ8ys9MtFDPbOW0udGBReN7rVY+/GiBAxpGhhtwolG9","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2086197210658508","user_name":"喜欢石琴的紫金花"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2086197210658508","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7602421477824007192","book_info":{"abstract":"1943年，汪伪政权下的上海暗流汹涌。军统王牌特工“鬼子六”郑耀先奉命潜入伪政府特工部，代号“风筝”，实则为中共高级特工；而明楼，以经济学海归身份成为汪伪政府首席财经顾问，公开身份为军统“毒蛇”，实则同样是中共地下党员。两位肩负多重身份的顶尖特工在敌营相遇，却互不知晓对方深层身份。\n郑耀先凭借狠辣手段赢得伪政府信任，暗中破坏特工部的秘密行动；明楼则利用经济决策权，悄然瓦解汪伪经济命脉。两人因各自任务多次交锋，彼此怀疑对方是真正的汉奸或竞争对手，在伪政府的权力角斗场上剑拔弩张。直到一次关乎中共地下组织存亡的危机中，他们发现彼此的暗号竟源自同一套密码系统……\n在上海这座暗影之城，两重伪装下的信仰者，能否识破对方的真实身份？当危机四伏、信任如纸薄，他们将如何周旋于汪伪、军统与自身真实使命之间，又能否在生死关头携手完成那场惊心动魄的“双影行动”？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f54d2cd2a4d100d62429832efbdfcd27","author":"新南派的神","author_id":"","book_id":"7602421477824007192","book_name":"伪装者之风筝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8472人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":504,\"name\":\"抗战谍战\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504\u0026name=抗战谍战\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":507,\"name\":\"谍战\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=507\u0026name=谍战\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":518,\"name\":\"特工\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=518\u0026name=特工\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7602421558325297688","read_count":"8472","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"373470"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"57","tags":"抗战谍战,谍战,历史,特工","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d3227d52466a95da439a935942322fda~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779433207\u0026x-signature=kExBxCyoCN8WvvzTAoqgH4bjMXA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3830318932704711","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"11"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323150007FA86B5FF35297CB4A2D3\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10465,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14049,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":241},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1772103487,"author_reply_time":1772103494,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7602421477824007192","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":59,"score_text":"59人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"20260323150007FA86B5FF35297CB4A2D3","message":"请求成功"}
